name: A Variational Barban-Davenport-Halberstam Theorem
title: A Variational Barban-Davenport-Halberstam Theorem
abstract: Develops variational forms of the Barban–Davenport–Halberstam theorem and the large sieve inequality.
findings: The manifest records the additive-sieve route as rejected for H15; the required reciprocal-phase structure is not controlled by this large-sieve input.
